indications.text:
1.1 Visualization of Vessels, Blood Flow and Tissue Perfusion
SPY AGENT™ GREEN is indicated in adults and pediatric patients one month of age and
older for:
• fluorescence imaging of micro- and macro-vasculature, blood flow and tissue perfusion
before, during and after vascular, gastrointestinal, or...
